---
title: "Cook and the Captive, or, Attalus the Hostage, The By Charlotte M.Yonge, author of ‘The Constable’s Tower’ ‘The Slaves of Sabinus’ etc."
---

## Cook and the Captive, or, Attalus the Hostage, The By Charlotte M.Yonge, author of ‘The Constable’s Tower’ ‘The Slaves of Sabinus’ etc.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** September 1894
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book 8vo 228pp

**Publisher:** London: National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, Westminster, New York: Thomas Whittaker, 2 & 3 Bible House.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
